mapper.select: SELECT H.HOSPITAL_ID, H.BIZ_NO, H.NAME, H.PHONE, H.ADDR, H.ADDR_DETAIL, H.DESCRIPTION, H.HOURS_JSON, H.TAG_LIST, H.LAT, H.LNG FROM TB_HOSPITAL H JOIN TB_BUSINESS B ON H.BIZ_NO = B.BIZ_NO WHERE B.BIZ_ID = #{bizId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_HOSPITAL ( HOSPITAL_ID, BIZ_NO, MEMBER_NO, NAME, PHONE, APPROVE_DATE, STATUS_CD ) SELECT (SELECT NVL(MAX(HOSPITAL_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_HOSPITAL), B.BIZ_NO, (SELECT MEMBER_NO FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = B.BIZ_ID OR EMAIL = B.BIZ_ID FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), B.BIZ_NAME, B.PHONE, SYSDATE, 'ACTIVE' FROM TB_BUSINESS B WHERE B.BIZ_ID = #{bizId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_HOSPITAL H WHERE H.BIZ_NO = B.BIZ_NO )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_HOSPITAL SET NAME = #{name}, PHONE = #{phone}, ADDR = #{addr}, ADDR_DETAIL = #{addrDetail}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, HOURS_JSON = #{hoursJson}, TAG_LIST = #{tagList}, LAT = #{lat}, LNG = #{lng} WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}
